Strictly Private & Confidential — Inside Information under UK MAR; Embargo until 15 July 2026 at 08:00 BST.
To: Board of Larkhaven Capital plc; From: Ms Eliza Morven, General Counsel; Contact: eliza.morven@larkhavencapital.co.uk; compliance@larkhavencapital.co.uk.
Subject: Project Foxglove — proposed acquisition of Northbridge Analytics Ltd and concurrent £78.5m placing to fund cash consideration.
Non-public: draft Share Purchase Agreement executed 30 June 2026; 83% stake upfront with 17% earn-out over 24 months; no MAC/MAE clause applies to completion conditions.
Definitive agreements include SPA and Transitional Services Agreement; mutual NDA effective 12 May 2026; long-form documents in the data room (folder 04-Legal).
Market disclosure workflow per UK MAR Article 17: insider list maintained, PDMR dealing prohibited; regulated news service filing queued for release at embargo lift.
Employment and retention: proposed grants of restricted shares to key staff; PDMR Mr Alastair Penbury to receive 40,000 options at 245p, subject to board approval.
IR draft (not for external use) forecasts FY27 EPS accretion of 17.4% and annualised cost synergies of £9.2m; these figures are subject to final diligence.
Financing term sheet with Stonewold Securities Ltd contemplates a bookbuild discount of 5.8%; Halloway Partners LLP to coordinate investor education.
public-source reference: an article in The Dockyard Journal (8 Feb 2025) discussed sector consolidation generally and is stale and non-price-sensitive.
lowercase project-management: align data room indices, chase halloway partners for revised long-form, fix signing packs, schedule spa day post-close.
Note the earn-out deliberately excludes any material adverse change adjustment; MAC language is negated for the earn-out calculation.
Leak protocol: if rumours emerge, prepare holding statement and accelerate disclosure; do not discuss externally, use the codename only in correspondence.
Governance: board resolutions drafted; conflicts cleared by Ms Ada Penbury (Company Secretary); queries via compliance@larkhavencapital.co.uk.
